mechanism: Government deficits mechanically flow into corporate profits via the Kalecki-Levy identity. At 6-7% deficit/GDP, this channel sustains 7-15% of S&P 500 EPS, creating a fiscal floor under the cycle that delays or prevents typical credit-driven drawdowns.
regime_dependence: Proportional to deficit size. Currently at historically elevated deficit levels making the channel unusually strong. Would weaken significantly under fiscal consolidation (deficit from 6.5% to 4.0% GDP).
